title: Create Distributed EC2 Deployment Documentation
description: Create Distributed EC2 Deployment Documentation - Develop comprehensive documentation for deploying LICHEN simulation infrastructure across multiple AWS EC2 instances for large-scale distributed mesh testing. Include deployment methods, scaling strategies, resource requirements, and best practices for heterogeneous mesh testing. This work supports the broader Epic: Complete Simulation Infrastructure Enhancement Epic.
close_reason: Created comprehensive documentation for deploying LICHEN simulation infrastructure across multiple AWS EC2 instances for large-scale distributed mesh testing. Includes deployment methods, scaling strategies, resource requirements, and best practices for heterogeneous mesh testing.
